title: $finish statement in always blocks produce errors

features.name: $finish system task in always block
features.description: Code should include a $finish system task used within an always block (not an initial block) for synthesizable RTL simulation assertions

features.name: $display system task in always block for comparison
features.description: Code should include a $display system task used within an always block to demonstrate Yosys handles it as warning while $finish is treated as error
